context: Agent generates feature flag blocks with static defaults, exclude blocks for production protection, and the skip → exclude migration, while explaining the local.* reference failure.

checklist.name: Feature flag with static default generated
checklist.description: Generated feature block uses 'default = false' (a static boolean), not 'default = local.env.locals.enable_monitoring'.

checklist.name: Why local.* reference fails explained
checklist.description: Agent explains that feature flag defaults are evaluated before locals are resolved, so local.* references are not available at that evaluation phase.

checklist.name: Exclude block for destroy protection
checklist.description: Generated exclude block for prod/rds uses 'if = true' and 'actions = ["destroy"]' to block only destroy operations while allowing plan and apply.

checklist.name: skip = true replaced with exclude block
checklist.description: Generated replacement for 'skip = true' uses an exclude block with 'if = true' and 'actions = ["all"]' or 'actions = ["all_except_output"]'.

checklist.name: Feature flag activation commands shown
checklist.description: Agent shows both 'terragrunt apply --feature enable_monitoring=true' and the equivalent TG_FEATURE environment variable approach.
